meaning: adj.卷数多的,大部分的,著书多的,容积大的,体积大的,丰满的,长篇的,庞大的
examples: The FBI kept a voluminous file on Pablo Picasso.
It was only when they shifted their attention from how companies behave to how they think that they began to make sense of their voluminous material.
I sank down into a voluminous armchair.
He had a presence, with his voluminous chest and large head of wild white hair.
These materials are voluminous, detailed, and cover technical, operational, and managerial aspects of cybersecurity.
